category_sources: Official mpg321 homepage describes it as a command-line mp3 player.
docs_sources: Official about page includes installing and project information.
Official homepage contains overview, download notes, and release notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage points to SourceForge downloads/project information but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official homepage says mpg321 is used as an mp3 player and mp3-to-wave decoder.
